name: CircleCI API
description: This describes the resources that make up the CircleCI API v2.

capabilities.name: insights
capabilities.description: Manage insights — get summary metrics and trends for a project across it's workflows and branches, get summary metrics with trends for the entire org, and for each project, get all branches for a project. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: job
capabilities.description: Manage job — cancel job by job id, cancel job by job number, get job details. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: user
capabilities.description: Manage user — user information, collaborations, user information. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: organization
capabilities.description: Manage organization — create a new organization, create a new url orb allow-list entry, get an organization. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: project
capabilities.description: Manage project — create a new project, create a new checkout key, create an environment variable. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: pipeline
capabilities.description: Manage pipeline — continue a pipeline, trigger a new pipeline, [recommended] trigger a new pipeline. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: schedule
capabilities.description: Manage schedule — create a schedule, list schedule triggers, get a schedule by id. available only on schedules associated with github oauth or bitbucket cloud pipeline definitions. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: webhook
capabilities.description: Manage webhook — create an outbound webhook, update an outbound webhook, list webhooks. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: workflow
capabilities.description: Manage workflow — cancel a workflow, rerun a workflow, approve a job. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: oidc_token_management
capabilities.description: Manage oidc token management — get org-level claims, get project-level claims, patch org-level claims. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: policy_management
capabilities.description: Manage policy management — makes a decision, creates policy bundle for the context, retrieves the owner's decision audit logs. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: context
capabilities.description: Manage context — create a new context, create context restriction, add or update an environment variable. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
